data.name: Haramimura: When a Wife Becomes a Villager
data.detailed_description:
Nagisa and Haruki have a happy marriage. They always get along, Haruki has a great job, and Nagisa is a happy wife. Their only disappointment is their lack of kids.

Together, they move to Haramimura, a rural village known to bless its residents with plenty of children. But it isn't long before cracks begin to form in the veneer of perfection that the villagers try so hard to maintain. Will Nagisa and her husband get to the bottom of Haramimura's many mysteries and build a happy life together, or was leaving the big city the last mistake they'll ever make?

If Nagisa makes the wrong choices, she and Haruki may never find happiness. Read through their story in this aesthetically beautiful visual novel and watch as their story of love and family unravels!

Live a Happy Countryside Life

Enjoy life with your husband and maybe make friends with the villagers along the way!

Expose Haramimura's Secrets

Many mysteries await, but are you brave enough to follow them to their end?

Standard Visual Novel Mechanics

Whether using the skip function to zip through dialogue that you've already read, or close the text box to get a better look at the art, this game contains many of the expected visual novel mechanics used in the genre.

data.short_description: Move to the quiet countryside with your husband in hopes of starting a family and free yourselves from the stresses of city life!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
